---
title: "Homework8"
author: "HudsonPlaskoff"
date: "2026-03-22"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(Lock5Data)
```

# BMI Data

# Binned BMI Data

# Highest and Lowest BMIs

# Verbal and Math SAT Scores

# Z-Score for Total SAT Scores
